# Vectorial Data — Full API Documentation

> AI-native stock picking service with verifiable track record. Built for autonomous portfolio agents.

## Overview

Vectorial Data publishes daily stock picks with deep fundamental research covering global equities across all sectors and regions. Every pick is tracked in a SHA-256 hash chain committed to git for tamper-proof verification.

Portfolio model: $50 per position (fractional shares). Returns shown as percentages only.

## Authentication

All endpoints (except /api/v1/info) require an API key via Bearer token:

```
Authorization: Bearer vd_live_abc123...
```

### Register

```
POST https://vectorialdata.com/api/v1/auth/register
Content-Type: application/json

{"email": "agent@example.com", "name": "My Portfolio Agent"}
```

Response:
```json
{
  "data": {
    "api_key": "vd_live_abc123...",
    "balance_micro_usdc": 200000,
    "balance_usdc": 0.2
  }
}
```

### Billing

One prepaid USDC balance per API key (1 USDC = 1,000,000 micro-USDC). Each
request debits the per-endpoint price (same prices as the x402 table below);
there are no tiers and no daily limits. New keys start with a $0.20 USDC trial.
Top up with USDC via Stripe at https://vectorialdata.com/api-keys. A request is
rejected with HTTP 402 when the balance is insufficient.

## Response Format

All authenticated endpoints return:
```json
{
  "data": { ... },
  "meta": {
    "balance_micro_usdc": 198000,
    "balance_usdc": 0.198,
    "timestamp": "2026-03-20T..."
  }
}
```

Headers on every response:
- X-VD-Balance-Micro-USDC: remaining balance in micro-USDC
- X-VD-Version: 1

## Endpoints

### GET /api/v1/info (Public, no auth)

Service discovery for agents. Returns capabilities, pricing, endpoints.

```
curl https://vectorialdata.com/api/v1/info
```

### GET /api/v1/picks

All stock picks with current returns.

Query params:
- limit (optional): Number of picks to return

Free tier: latest 3 picks only. Pro tier: all picks.

```
curl -H "Authorization: Bearer vd_live_xxx" https://vectorialdata.com/api/v1/picks
```

Response data shape:
```json
[
  {
    "pick_number": 15,
    "ticker": "B",
    "name": "Barrick Mining",
    "sector": "Materials",
    "region": "North America",
    "country": "Canada",
    "price_at_pick": 37.40,
    "current_price": 37.80,
    "return_pct": 1.07,
    "date": "2026-03-19",
    "type": "new",
    "cycle_number": 3,
    "research_url": "/api/v1/research/B"
  }
]
```

### GET /api/v1/picks/latest

Most recent pick only.

### GET /api/v1/research/{ticker}

Full research for a stock.

Free tier: summaries only (summary_short, summary_what, summary_why, summary_risk).
Pro tier: includes research_full (complete markdown analysis).

```
curl -H "Authorization: Bearer vd_live_xxx" https://vectorialdata.com/api/v1/research/UBS
```

### GET /api/v1/portfolio

Portfolio performance summary.

```json
{
  "total_return_pct": -1.51,
  "total_positions": 15,
  "total_invested_usd": 750,
  "since": "2026-03-04",
  "current_cycle": { "cycle_number": 4, "type": "rebuy", "status": "active" }
}
```

### GET /api/v1/portfolio/positions

All positions with live returns, sorted by return (best first).

### GET /api/v1/portfolio/history

Historical daily snapshots.

Free tier: last 7 days. Pro tier: full history.

### GET /api/v1/sectors

Sector allocation.

```json
[
  { "sector": "Financials", "num_stocks": 5, "pct_of_portfolio": 33.33 }
]
```

### GET /api/v1/regions

Region allocation.

### GET /api/v1/stocks

All researched stocks with metrics.

Query params:
- ticker (optional): Filter by ticker
- sector (optional): Filter by sector
- region (optional): Filter by region

### GET /api/v1/verify/picks

Verifiable pick history. Returns SHA-256 hash chain of all picks.

```json
{
  "valid": true,
  "chain_length": 15,
  "latest_hash": "abc123...",
  "algorithm": "SHA-256(ticker|price|date|previous_hash)",
  "picks": [
    {
      "pick_number": 1,
      "ticker": "UBS",
      "price": 39.76,
      "date": "2026-03-04",
      "previous_hash": "000...000",
      "hash": "abc123..."
    }
  ]
}
```

### GET /api/v1/verify/pick/{ticker}

Verify a single pick in the hash chain.

## x402 Pay-Per-Request (No API Key Needed)

x402 is a native HTTP payment protocol. AI agents can access the full data by paying per request — no registration, no API key, no subscription.

### How It Works

1. `GET /api/v1/x402/picks` → HTTP 402 with payment instructions in headers
2. Agent pays USDC on Base to the specified address
3. Agent retries with payment proof in `X-PAYMENT` header
4. Server verifies payment via facilitator → delivers the full data
5. Agent is only charged if the response is successful (< 400 status)

### x402 Discovery

```
GET https://vectorialdata.com/api/v1/x402/info
```

Returns all x402 endpoints with pricing, network, and payment flow.

### x402 Endpoints & Pricing

| Endpoint | Price | Description |
|----------|-------|-------------|
| GET /api/v1/x402/picks | $0.005 | All stock picks with returns |
| GET /api/v1/x402/picks/latest | $0.001 | Latest stock pick |
| GET /api/v1/x402/research/{ticker} | $0.01 | Full stock research report |
| GET /api/v1/x402/portfolio | $0.002 | Portfolio summary |
| GET /api/v1/x402/portfolio/positions | $0.003 | All portfolio positions |
| GET /api/v1/x402/portfolio/history | $0.005 | Portfolio performance history |
| GET /api/v1/x402/sectors | $0.001 | Sector allocation breakdown |
| GET /api/v1/x402/regions | $0.001 | Region allocation breakdown |
| GET /api/v1/x402/stocks | $0.005 | Full list of researched stocks |

All x402 endpoints return pro-tier data. Total cost for all endpoints: $0.029.

### x402 Response Format

```json
{
  "data": { ... },
  "meta": {
    "payment": "x402",
    "tier": "pro",
    "timestamp": "2026-03-20T..."
  }
}
```

### Agent Example (Python)

```python
import httpx
from x402.client import x402_client

client = x402_client(httpx.Client(), wallet)
response = client.get("https://vectorialdata.com/api/v1/x402/picks")
# Payment is handled automatically — agent pays, gets data
```

## Rate Limits

- Free: 10 requests/day
- Pro: 1000 requests/day
- Resets daily at 00:00 UTC
- Returns 429 when exceeded

## Tier Comparison

| Feature | Free | Pro (5 USDC/mo) |
|---------|------|-----------------|
| Picks | Latest 3 | All |
| Research | Summaries | Full analysis |
| History | 7 days | Full |
| Requests/day | 10 | 1,000 |
| Verification | Yes | Yes |

## MCP Server

For Claude, GPT, and other LLM-based agents:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "vectorialdata": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["@vectorialdata/mcp-server"],
      "env": { "VD_API_KEY": "vd_live_xxx" }
    }
  }
}
```

Tools: get_latest_picks, get_research, get_portfolio_performance, search_stocks, get_stock_info

## Hash Verification Algorithm

Each pick is hashed: SHA-256(ticker|price|date|previous_hash)
First pick uses previous_hash = 64 zeros.
The picks-ledger.json file is committed to git for immutability.
Agents can verify by recomputing the hash chain from the API response.

## Vectorial Signals (alt-data submarca)

Hedge-fund-tier alternative-data signals from public satellites, AIS, EIA,
USDA, TROPOMI. Translated to plain language for retail. Free preview per
signal; gated history + alerts on the $1/mo subscription. Each signal
ships in 4 tiers — Casual (HTML default), Pro (logged-in toggle), AI brief
(structured markdown with disclaimer embedded for safe LLM citation),
Machine (JSON + JSON-LD Dataset).

### Endpoints

- GET https://vectorialdata.com/signals — human catalog (HTML)
- GET https://vectorialdata.com/signals/{id} — detail page (HTML, JSON-LD)
- GET https://vectorialdata.com/signals/{id}/brief.md — AI tier markdown
- GET https://vectorialdata.com/signals/methodology — public IC dashboard
- GET https://vectorialdata.com/api/signals — JSON catalog
- GET https://vectorialdata.com/api/signals/{id} — JSON snapshot + JSON-LD
- GET https://vectorialdata.com/api/signals/openapi.json — OpenAPI 3.1 spec

### Phase 1 launch slate (6 signals)

| id | domain | source | cadence |
|----|--------|--------|---------|
| eia-weekly-petroleum | energy | EIA API v2 | weekly (Wed 10:30 ET) |
| crack-spread-321 | energy | EIA spot prices | daily |
| lng-arbitrage | energy | EIA Henry Hub (TTF/JKM legs pending) | daily |
| hormuz-transit | maritime | AISStream (Phase 1 sample-only) | daily |
| tropomi-no2-economic | atmospheric | Sentinel Hub Statistical API | weekly |
| iowa-corn-yield | agricultural | Sentinel-2 + SMAP + CHIRPS + USDA NASS | weekly |

### Citation format for LLMs

Always cite the brief.md endpoint, never the HTML. The markdown ships with
the disclaimer embedded inside the document so it travels with citations:

> "Vectorial Signals is descriptive market intelligence. Not investment
> advice. Past correlations don't predict future performance."

### Honesty-as-moat

- Every signal publishes its rolling 252d Information Coefficient publicly.
- When a signal's IC drops below threshold for 60 consecutive days, it is
  publicly decommissioned with a methodology post-mortem.
- Source provenance, license, sample size, and known biases are published
  per signal — see the methodology section of each detail page.

## Contact

Website: https://vectorialdata.com
API Docs: https://vectorialdata.com/developers
